heading: Tolls and fares: payment or reimbursement
label: 8753 Tolls and fares: payment or reimbursement
text: Naval appropriations chargeable for transportation or travel are available for the payment or reimbursement of ferry, bridge, and similar tolls and of streetcar, bus, and similar fares.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7523.34 U.S.C. 899a, .Aug. 2, 1946, ch. 756, § 2360 Stat. 856
